dashas.system_note: Vimshottari is the primary dasha system in Parashara Jyotish. The starting dasha is determined by the Moon's nakshatra at birth. The balance of the first dasha is calculated from how far the Moon has traversed the nakshatra.

mahadashas.positive_expression: Rise in status, government favour, recognition, vitality
mahadashas.negative_expression: Ego clashes, father issues, health problems if Sun weak
mahadashas.key_ages_note: Often significant around ages when Sun dasha runs

mahadashas.positive_expression: Emotional fulfilment, public recognition, wealth, comfort
mahadashas.negative_expression: Emotional instability, mother issues, mental stress if Moon weak
mahadashas.key_ages_note: Quality heavily dependent on Moon waxing/waning and sign

mahadashas.positive_expression: Energy, initiative, property gains, courage, sibling support
mahadashas.negative_expression: Accidents, conflicts, surgery, impulsiveness if Mars weak

mahadashas.positive_expression: Career rise, foreign opportunities, material gains, innovation
mahadashas.negative_expression: Confusion, illusion, deception, health issues if Rahu badly placed
mahadashas.key_ages_note: Longest dasha after Venus — transformative period

mahadashas.positive_expression: Prosperity, wisdom, marriage, children, spiritual growth
mahadashas.negative_expression: Over-expansion, overconfidence, liver issues if Jupiter weak
mahadashas.key_ages_note: Generally the most auspicious dasha for most lagnas

mahadashas.positive_expression: Steady career growth, property, longevity, karmic rewards
mahadashas.negative_expression: Delays, health issues, isolation, hardship if Saturn weak
mahadashas.key_ages_note: Longest malefic dasha — tests and rewards patience

mahadashas.positive_expression: Business success, education, writing, communication skills
mahadashas.negative_expression: Nervous issues, indecision, deception if Mercury weak

mahadashas.positive_expression: Spiritual growth, research, moksha orientation, healing
mahadashas.negative_expression: Confusion, accidents, detachment from worldly matters
mahadashas.key_ages_note: Often brings unexpected events and spiritual turning points

mahadashas.positive_expression: Marriage, wealth, luxury, artistic success, vehicles
mahadashas.negative_expression: Overindulgence, relationship issues if Venus weak or afflicted
mahadashas.key_ages_note: Longest dasha — most significant for relationships and wealth

antardashas.calculation_note: Each mahadasha is divided into 9 antardashas. The first antardasha belongs to the mahadasha lord itself. Duration = (mahadasha_years × antardasha_years) / 120

pratyantardashas.calculation_note: Each antardasha is further divided into 9 pratyantardashas using the same proportional formula. Duration = (antardasha_days × pratyantardasha_years) / 120
pratyantardashas.use_note: Pratyantardasha lord activates very specific short-term themes — used for precise event timing in Phase 9

dasha_interpretation_rules.effect: Generally positive period — house themes flourish
Challenging period — obstacles and disruptions in house themes
Difficult dasha — hidden struggles, health issues, losses
Strong dasha — house themes activate powerfully and positively
Excellent dasha — maximum positive expression of house themes
Difficult dasha — unless neecha bhanga cancels
Dasha activates the yoga — yoga results manifest during this period
Smooth sub-period — both lords support each other
Difficult sub-period — conflicting energies, tension and obstacles

secondary_systems.name: YOGINI
secondary_systems.use_note: Used as confirmation system alongside Vimshottari — shorter total period

secondary_systems.name: ASHTOTTARI
secondary_systems.use_note: Used when Rahu is in a specific position — alternate 108-year system

secondary_systems.name: KALACHAKRA
secondary_systems.use_note: Advanced system based on navamsa — used for refined timing in Phase 10
